folio.label: 46v
folio.l: And seide , vn do Gerueys , and that anon
What who art æow , it am I Absolouö
What Absolou~ , what cristes swete tre
Why ryse ©e so rathe , ey benedicite
What eyleth ©ow , som gay gerle god it wote
Hath brougút ©ow thus , vp on the veritote
By seynt Note , ©e wot wel what I mene
This Absolouö , ne rougút nat a bene
Of al his pley , no word a geyn he ©af
He had more thougút , on his distaf´
Than Gerueys knew , and seide frend so dere
That hote culter , in the chemyny here
As lene it me , I haue there with to done
I wol bryng it the , a geyn , ful sone
Gerueys answered , certes were it gold
Or in a poke , nobles al vn told
Thow shuldust haue , as I am trewe Smytú
Ey cristes foo , what wol ©e do ther wytú
There of q¶ Absolou~ , be as be may
I shal wel telle it the , a nother day
And cauth the cultur , by the hote stele
Ful softe ou©t at the dore , he gan to stele
And went vn to , the Carpenteres wal
He kougheth first , & knokketh ther with al
Vp on the wyndowe , rigút as he dede ere
This Alisouö answered , who is there
That knokketh so , I warent it is a thefe
Nay nay q¶ he , god wot my swete lefe
I am thyn Absolouö , thy derlyng
Of gold q¶ he , I haue the brou©t a ryng
My moder ©af it me , so god me saue
Ful Fyne it is , and ther to wel I graue
This wol I ©eue the , if thow me kysse
¢ This Nicholas , was risen vp , to pysse
He thougút he wolde amende , al the Iape
He shulde kysse hise ars , er that he skape
And vp the wyndowe , he dide hastily
And ou©t his ers , he putteth preuyly
Ouä the buttok , to the ch ch haunche bon
And ther with spak this Clerk , this Absolouö
Speke swete brede , I not where thow art
¢ This Nicholas a non , let flee a fart
As gret as it had ben , a thonder dynt
That w the stroke , he was almost I blynt
